title: The ONLY 6 Skills You Need to 10x Your Claude Projects
summary: Austin Marchese presents six Claude techniques for improved project productivity: web scraping for data discovery, /ingest-source for knowledge base capture, /improve-system for iterative refinement, /ask-the-board for multi-perspective advisory, /internal-focus-group for user testing, and compound engineering for shipping. The workflow is demonstrated building a personal fitness trainer project.
